## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on pod transitions, priorities, and process improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/7NiyjgUCxMLkHhbgQU4xkREze5-R7hUh?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Pod Transition:** Nathan Navidzadeh is the new ME/CM for DataGrid, replacing Ismail Ajagbe, who is moving to a new role.](https://fathom.video/share/7NiyjgUCxMLkHhbgQU4xkREze5-R7hUh?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
  - [**Agentic Pipeline Inefficiency:** The new agentic pipelines are slower (\~90 min vs. \~60 min) and require the same manual input as the old workflow, yielding no time savings.](https://fathom.video/share/7NiyjgUCxMLkHhbgQU4xkREze5-R7hUh?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
  - [**Webflow Table Bug:** A bug preventing tables from appearing in the DataGrid CMS was resolved; the fix is to publish the page, as tables are hidden in preview.](https://fathom.video/share/7NiyjgUCxMLkHhbgQU4xkREze5-R7hUh?tab=summary&timestamp=899.0)
  - [**Content Structure:** Comparison articles must use descriptive H2s/H3s for skimmability and efficient LLM scraping; excessive bolding should be removed.](https://fathom.video/share/7NiyjgUCxMLkHhbgQU4xkREze5-R7hUh?tab=summary&timestamp=1695.0)

## Topics

### Pod Transitions

  - [**Ismail Ajagbe:** Moving to a new role after a significant contribution since February.](https://fathom.video/share/7NiyjgUCxMLkHhbgQU4xkREze5-R7hUh?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)
  - [**Nathan Navidzadeh:** New ME/CM for DataGrid.](https://fathom.video/share/7NiyjgUCxMLkHhbgQU4xkREze5-R7hUh?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
      - [**Background:** Content strategy, course creation, and AI model training (biology, writing).](https://fathom.video/share/7NiyjgUCxMLkHhbgQU4xkREze5-R7hUh?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)
      - [**Transition Plan:** Nika Narimanidze will co-manage DataGrid next week, with Nathan taking full ownership the following week.](https://fathom.video/share/7NiyjgUCxMLkHhbgQU4xkREze5-R7hUh?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)

### Agentic Pipeline Performance

  - [**Problem:** The new pipelines are slower and less efficient than the old workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/7NiyjgUCxMLkHhbgQU4xkREze5-R7hUh?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
      - [**Galileo:** \~90-minute run time.](https://fathom.video/share/7NiyjgUCxMLkHhbgQU4xkREze5-R7hUh?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
      - [**DataGrid:** \~60-minute run time, with a 35-minute research phase yielding poor results.](https://fathom.video/share/7NiyjgUCxMLkHhbgQU4xkREze5-R7hUh?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
  - [**Root Cause:** The pipelines require the same manual input as the old workflow, failing to eliminate the assignment brief stage in Claude.](https://fathom.video/share/7NiyjgUCxMLkHhbgQU4xkREze5-R7hUh?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)
  - [**Path Forward:** Vivek Shankar has a call with Stevie on Monday to clarify the correct input process.](https://fathom.video/share/7NiyjgUCxMLkHhbgQU4xkREze5-R7hUh?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)

### DataGrid Webflow Table Bug

  - [**Problem:** HTML tables were not appearing in the DataGrid CMS.](https://fathom.video/share/7NiyjgUCxMLkHhbgQU4xkREze5-R7hUh?tab=summary&timestamp=899.0)
  - [**Resolution:** The issue is a Webflow quirk, not a bug in the HTML code.](https://fathom.video/share/7NiyjgUCxMLkHhbgQU4xkREze5-R7hUh?tab=summary&timestamp=1014.0)
      - [**Fix:** Tables are hidden in the CMS preview and only become visible on the live, published page.](https://fathom.video/share/7NiyjgUCxMLkHhbgQU4xkREze5-R7hUh?tab=summary&timestamp=1278.0)
      - **Note:** The `<!DOCTYPE html>` tag is unnecessary and can be removed.

### Content Strategy: Comparison Articles

  - [**Goal:** Make comparison articles skimmable and easy to navigate for readers and LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/7NiyjgUCxMLkHhbgQU4xkREze5-R7hUh?tab=summary&timestamp=1695.0)
  - [**Required Structure:**](https://fathom.video/share/7NiyjgUCxMLkHhbgQU4xkREze5-R7hUh?tab=summary&timestamp=1695.0)
      - [Use descriptive H2s/H3s (e.g., "API Access & Pricing") to allow readers to quickly find specific comparisons.](https://fathom.video/share/7NiyjgUCxMLkHhbgQU4xkREze5-R7hUh?tab=summary&timestamp=1759.0)
      - [Consolidate related sub-topics into single sections (e.g., "Model Evolution").](https://fathom.video/share/7NiyjgUCxMLkHhbgQU4xkREze5-R7hUh?tab=summary&timestamp=1516.0)
      - [Remove excessive, algorithm-generated bolding that does not serve a strategic purpose.](https://fathom.video/share/7NiyjgUCxMLkHhbgQU4xkREze5-R7hUh?tab=summary&timestamp=1621.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**All:**](https://fathom.video/share/7NiyjgUCxMLkHhbgQU4xkREze5-R7hUh?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)

      - [Update cloud projects with meeting transcripts.](https://fathom.video/share/7NiyjgUCxMLkHhbgQU4xkREze5-R7hUh?tab=summary&timestamp=111.0)
  - [**Ismail Ajagbe:**](https://fathom.video/share/7NiyjgUCxMLkHhbgQU4xkREze5-R7hUh?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
      - [Provide a TLDR summary of remaining engineering issues.](https://fathom.video/share/7NiyjgUCxMLkHhbgQU4xkREze5-R7hUh?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
      - [Send the written Rapid XML process (video already exists).](https://fathom.video/share/7NiyjgUCxMLkHhbgQU4xkREze5-R7hUh?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
  - [**Nika Narimanidze:**](https://fathom.video/share/7NiyjgUCxMLkHhbgQU4xkREze5-R7hUh?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
      - [Schedule a call with Nathan Navidzadeh to hand off DataGrid publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/7NiyjgUCxMLkHhbgQU4xkREze5-R7hUh?tab=summary&timestamp=1897.0)
      - [Finalize the RAMP agentic pipeline test by Monday.](https://fathom.video/share/7NiyjgUCxMLkHhbgQU4xkREze5-R7hUh?tab=summary&timestamp=464.0)
  - [**Usman:**](https://fathom.video/share/7NiyjgUCxMLkHhbgQU4xkREze5-R7hUh?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)
      - [Send feedback on the Strapi agentic pipeline to Vivek Shankar.](https://fathom.video/share/7NiyjgUCxMLkHhbgQU4xkREze5-R7hUh?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)
  - [**Vivek Shankar:**](https://fathom.video/share/7NiyjgUCxMLkHhbgQU4xkREze5-R7hUh?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)
      - [Consolidate Strapi feedback and create a Linear ticket for Stevie.](https://fathom.video/share/7NiyjgUCxMLkHhbgQU4xkREze5-R7hUh?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)
      - [Meet with Stevie on Monday to clarify the agentic pipeline input process.](https://fathom.video/share/7NiyjgUCxMLkHhbgQU4xkREze5-R7hUh?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)
